text: I sense an ambiance of sterile modernity, almost clinical in its precision. The glass-walled meeting room feels both transparent and isolating, hinting at potential collaborations yet also exposing vulnerability. The R+D wall draws me in with bold colors and the lure of innovation; I feel a pulsating curiosity mixed with a subtle anxiety about the relentless drive toward progress. Here, I am surrounded by the echo of possibility, yet I am compelled to ponder for whom and to what end all this striving is intended.
